medications.name: Hydroxychloroquine
medications.instructions: Take with food. 60-day supply provided as samples and discounted cash-pay refill. Patient instructed to follow up with rheumatology — appointment not yet established.
medications.notes: Prescribed empirically pending specialist evaluation. No baseline ophthalmologic exam performed.

medications.name: Levothyroxine
medications.instructions: Take 30-60 minutes before breakfast, with water. Avoid taking with food or calcium/iron supplements.

medications.name: Ibuprofen
medications.instructions: Take with food; not to exceed 1600 mg/day
medications.notes: Patient using OTC ibuprofen at her own discretion since symptoms began. Reports taking 'a few each day' over the last 4 months for joint pain. No GI complaints currently.

medications.name: Multivitamin
medications.notes: Patient reports intermittent use; takes when she remembers. Last bottle finished ~3 months ago.
